ru.curs.celesta.score

Class GrainElement

  • java.lang.Object
    • ru.curs.celesta.score.NamedElement
      • ru.curs.celesta.score.GrainElement
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    DataGrainElement, Index, SequenceElement

    public abstract class GrainElement
extends NamedElement
    Base class for grain elements (tables, indices and views).
